errors.name: InsufficientSettlement
errors.msg: Settlement amount is below funded principal

fields.name: advance_amount
docs: advance paid to SME (80–95% of face value); target for investor funding

fields.name: repayment_amount
docs: full receivable value when the debtor pays (face value + interest)

fields.name: settled_share_supply
docs: total shares outstanding when the invoice was settled

fields.name: settlement_pool
docs: fixed USDC pool for investor claims after settlement

fields.name: claimed_amount
docs: running total paid out from settlement_pool
